title: Opening for Medical Officer at Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies!
